metadata.title: CEO of One — Build Real Products Without Writing Code
metadata.description: In 2026, one person is a company. No coding required, no team needed. OpenClaw is your COO, Claude Code is your engineer. You speak, they build.
metadata.ogTitle: CEO of One — Build Real Products Without Writing Code
metadata.ogDescription: One person, one company. AI builds it; you own 100%. 13 chapters, 111 tests, battle-tested methodology.

hero.title: Your competitors ship 10x faster—not because they code better, but because they’ve stopped coding altogether.
hero.subtitle: In 2026, you don't need to learn code. You need to learn to think. Tell AI one sentence, it builds your product.
hero.ctaProof: No code. No setup. Just talk.

before.label: Before
before.text: Non-technical founder, 6 months, $50K spent, product still in beta

after.label: After
after.text: Same person, 7 days, $0, product live and processing payments

narrative.title: This isn't a dream. It's what our students do every day.

1.text: You have a product idea. Maybe you're a designer, a marketer, or a domain expert who's never written a line of code.

2.text: You describe what you want in plain language⁠. Your AI COO breaks it into tasks, your AI engineer writes production-ready⁠ code⁠.

3.text: Days later, your product is live⁠. You own 100% of the code, 100% of the equity⁠. No investors⁠. No compromise⁠s⁠.

result.title: Product ships, you own 100% equity — and it fixes itself

pricing.title: Invest in Yourself
pricing.lifetime: Lifetime access, including all future updates

1.q: I have zero technical skills. Can I really learn this?
1.a: Yes. This course teaches you how to speak, not how to code.

2.a: Basic computer skills and the ability to type.

3.q: What can I build after completing?
3.a: A revenue-generating online product. You own 100% of the code and equity.

4.q: Do the AI tools cost money?
4.a: Claude Code has a free tier sufficient for all chapters.

5.a: You can request a full refund within 14 days of purchase, no questions asked.

6.q: How much time do I need to complete the course?
6.a: Most students finish in 2-4 weeks at 1-2 hours per day. All chapters are self-paced.

7.a: A computer with internet access and basic typing skills. No coding or AI experience needed.

8.q: Do I get a certificate upon completion?
8.a: Yes. You receive a verifiable completion certificate and a portfolio-ready project.

9.a: Absolutely. 30-day money-back guarantee. If you are not satisfied, you get a full refund.
